title: Rotian's Spears
description: A pixel-art redraw of spear weapons, preserving vanilla proportions while improving material clarity and visual consistency.
body:
### **Detailed Description**

- Spears Redrawn is a visual rework of spear-type weapons focused on clarity, material readability, and internal consistency.
The objective is not to redesign spears conceptually, but to redraw them using cleaner pixel clusters, controlled contrast, and a shared visual language aligned with vanilla Minecraft aesthetics.
- All spear items retain their original proportions and recognizable silhouettes. Changes are strictly limited to pixel-level refinements:
- cleaner and more readable edges
- reduced visual noise
- consistent and restrained shading
- clearer separation between shaft, blade, and binding materials
- The redraw avoids stylization, exaggerated highlights, or dramatic contrast. Shading is intentionally conservative to ensure compatibility with vanilla lighting and other resource packs.
- This pack is intended for players who want spear weapons to appear more refined while remaining visually coherent with the base game.



## **Contents**

### This resource pack includes redrawn pixel-art textures for the following items:

- Spear weapons (all included variants within this pack)

All items follow the same visual rules: preserved vanilla proportions, consistent shading logic, and clear material definition.



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![View of all Spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0145177954e025b64a015dba0c236f02ebad632_0.webp)

</details>




## **Features**

- Redrawn spear weapons in pixel art
- Vanilla silhouettes preserved
- Improved material separation
- Consistent visual language across all spear items
- No gameplay changes
- Compatibility
- Vanilla-friendly
- Works with default Minecraft lighting
- Compatible with most resource packs that do not override spear textures



## **Installation**

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your resourcepacks folder
3. Enable it from the in-game Resource Packs menu



## **License**

### **MIT License**

- This project is licensed under the MIT License.
You are free to use, modify, and redistribute this resource pack, including for commercial purposes, provided that proper credit is given and the license notice is included.



### **Notes**

This project is purely visual. Feedback should focus on readability, consistency, and pixel-level execution rather than mechanical or conceptual changes.
